title: croton decipiens
intro: Croton decipiens, also known as the false croton, is a shrub-like plant native to tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Croton decipiens include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Croton decipiens are often made from the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
